name: Clear-Wait: 7-day delay + 21-day stock cover + GOLD customer with 10-day deadline
rubric_notes: 7-day delay (168h) is well within 21-day stock cover (504h). GOLD customer deadline (240h) lands AFTER primary supplier's expected recovery — the order is fulfillable from current/restocked inventory. BackupChoice exists but switching costs 12% more for no actual coverage benefit given the comfortable cover. Confidence HIGH on wait; MEDIUM is acceptable if the Arbiter wants to surface that GOLD-customer exposure could justify hedging as defensive insurance.
